# Pedro Bot Refactoring Project

This workspace is dedicated to refactoring the Pedro Discord bot from Python (discord.py) to Convo programming language.

## Project Structure
- `original_pedro/` - Contains the original Python Pedro bot for reference
- `convo_interpreter/` - Contains the Convo language interpreter 
- `pedro_convo/` - Contains the refactored Pedro bot in Convo syntax
- `docs/` - Documentation and comparison guides

## Convo Language Guidelines
- Use natural, conversational syntax
- Leverage Convo's 23 built-in Discord functions
- Focus on readability and accessibility
- Follow Convo syntax patterns from the official repository

## Development Notes
- The Convo language compiles to Python internally
- Discord bot functionality is abstracted through Convo's Discord module
- Maintain feature parity with the original Pedro bot while improving syntax clarity
